address.address1: Jalan Bengkel Tris Desa umah opat kecamatan Bebesen Takengon Aceh Tengah

description.short: Conveniently situated in the Takengon part of Aceh, this property puts you close to attractions and interesting dining options. This 3-star property is packed with in-house facilities to improve the quality and joy of your stay.

extraBed: Extra beds are dependent on the room you choose. Please check the individual room capacity for more details.
additional: When booking more than 5 rooms, different policies and additional supplements may apply.

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: I really enjoyed staying at this homestay... clean and comfortable.. no regrets.. I highly recommend this homestay when traveling to Takengon.. an amazing experience.
comments.reviewTitle: The homestay is nice and clean.
comments.originalComment: Suka sekali nginap di homestay ini...bersih dan nyaman..gak nyesal..saya sangat merekomendasikan homestay ini bila bepergian ke takengon..pengalaman luar biasa

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: The first time I went to Takengon, I saw on Agoda there was a homestay called Pintu Waluh. The homestay is clean, with a new building, and has facilities like 1 gallon of water, spoons, plates, and glasses, with 2 bedrooms and 2 bathrooms. The spring beds and beddings are still new. The homestay is not far from Lake Laut Tawar. I really like this homestay, recommended for those who bring a large family. Thank you, Agoda.
comments.reviewTitle: The most comfortable accommodation when bringing the family.
comments.originalTitle: Penginapan paling nyaman kalo bawa keluarga
comments.originalComment:
Pertama kalinya saya ke takengon, liat di agoda ada homestay pintu waluh, 
Homestaynya bersih bangunan baru, dpt fasilitas air 1 galon, sendok piring gelas, kamar 2 kamar mandi 2, springbednyaa dan spreinya masih baruu
Homestaynya gak jauh dari danau laut tawar
Pokoknya syuka sama homestay ini, recomended utk yg bawa keluarga besar
Terimakasih agoda

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: rekomendasi penginapan untuk keluarga, semuanya bets deh pokoknyaaa

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Recommendations for those looking for affordable, clean, and comfortable homestays.
comments.originalComment: Rekomendasi buat yg cari homestay harga terjangkau, bersih dan nyaman

comments.formattedReviewHelpfulText: Did you find this review helpful?
comments.reviewComments: Letak rumah yang tidak terlalu jauh dari pusat kota. Jalan menuju rumah cukup kecil tapi pas pasan untuk 2 mobil. areanya cukup tenang. tapi parkiran tidak ada atapnya dan kemarin sempat cukup lama mati lampu karena pemadaman kota. tapi secara umum tempat ini cukup nyaman untuk didatangi dengan keluarga atau sahabat
